raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Ramos-authored proposals provide relief to California's struggling small businesses.",
    "Tens of thousands of California businesses have temporarily or permanently closed due to economic challenges.",
    "The small business relief package includes protection from unfounded lawsuits for businesses following pandemic-related health laws.",
    "AB 632 implements a tiered reduction in the minimum franchise tax for small businesses with gross receipts less than $15 million.",
    "AB 643 requires schools to notify apprenticeship programs of planned career or college fairs to increase student apprenticeship options.",
    "AB 743 creates a rebuttable presumption that COVID-19 causes direct physical damage under business interruption for insured businesses.",
    "AB 743 clarifies that direct physical damage includes COVID-19 for the purposes of business interruption insurance claims."
  ]
}
```
